expectations.text: Form structure with form element wrapping label+input pairs
expectations.evidence: Form element properly contains multiple div(class := 'form-group') sections, each with label+input pair for username and email fields

expectations.text: Bootstrap className applied as tuple for multi-value attributes
expectations.evidence: All className attributes use proper tuple syntax without mixing string concatenation or space-separated values

expectations.text: Validation attributes (required, minlength, maxlength) properly applied
expectations.evidence: input elements have required, minlength, maxlength attributes correctly set on appropriate fields

expectations.text: Label-input linking with htmlFor and id attributes
expectations.evidence: Labels use htmlFor attribute matching corresponding input id values, ensuring accessibility

expectations.text: Void elements (input) used without children, attributes only
expectations.evidence: input elements are self-closing with attributes only, no attempted child content

expectations.text: Proper nesting: form > div.form-group > (label, input) structure
expectations.evidence: Form element contains properly nested div.form-group sections, each with label followed by input
